kw.name: Set Library Search Order
kw.doc: Sets the resolution order to use when a name matches multiple keywords.

kw.name: Set Log Level
kw.msg: Log level changed from INFO to TRACE.
kw.doc: Sets the log threshold to the specified level.

test.name: 1 - address validation with correct parameters

kw.name: Log Variables
kw.msg: &{DataDriver_DATA_DICT} = { 1 - address validation with correct parameters={'test_case_name': '1 - address validation with correct parameters', 'arguments': {'${network}': 'TRC20', '${address}': 'TLGuoCeM2CHrH61QwJ6AHhW1yjfbgg5QNW'}, 'tags': None, 'documentation': None} }

@{DataDriver_DATA_LIST} = [ {'test_case_name': '1 - address validation with correct parameters', 'arguments': {'${network}': 'TRC20', '${address}': 'TLGuoCeM2CHrH61QwJ6AHhW1yjfbgg5QNW'}, 'tags': None, 'documentation': None} ]

&{DataDriver_TEST_DATA} = { test_case_name=1 - address validation with correct parameters | arguments={'${network}': 'TRC20', '${address}': 'TLGuoCeM2CHrH61QwJ6AHhW1yjfbgg5QNW'} | tags=None | documentation=None }
kw.doc: Logs all variables in the current scope with given log level.

kw.name: Address Validation
When a user sends an address in an specific network
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Post User parameters by API For Valid Response
Check Address Validation
POST
kw.msg: ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='127.0.0.1', port=3000): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/v2/address/validate (Caused by NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPConnection object at 0x101d57c70>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused'))

kw.name: Then the user can see if address verification response is valid

kw.status: ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='127.0.0.1', port=3000): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/v2/address/validate (Caused by NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPConnection object at 0x101d57c70>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused'))

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
Set Tags
kw.doc: Adds given ``tags`` for the current test or all tests in a suite.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Passed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test passed.

test.status: ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='127.0.0.1', port=3000): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/v2/address/validate (Caused by NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPConnection object at 0x101d57c70>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused'))
